tasks.title: Investigate error source for 'Content Not Found: Create' in task start flow
tasks.description: Analyze the code handling the 'Start Next Task' button click event to identify where the 'Content Not Found: Create' error is generated. Review related components, services, and routing logic that manage task creation or retrieval. Check for missing content keys or incorrect references to 'Create'.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause of the 'Content Not Found: Create' error is identified
Relevant code locations responsible for the error are documented

outputPlan.description: Diagnostic report detailing the source of the 'Content Not Found: Create' error

metadata.inputContext: Project source code related to task management and UI event handling
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides clear understanding of the error source to enable targeted fix

tasks.title: Fix missing or incorrect content key causing 'Content Not Found: Create' error
tasks.description: Based on the investigation, correct the missing or incorrect content key or route parameter that causes the 'Content Not Found: Create' error when starting the next task. This may involve fixing route definitions, content lookup keys, or default values in task creation logic.
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Content Not Found: Create' error no longer occurs when clicking Start Next Task
The next task starts correctly with valid content

outputPlan.description: Fix content key or route parameter usage in Start Next Task button component
Correct task retrieval or creation logic to use valid content keys

metadata.inputContext: Diagnostic report and code references from previous investigation
evidence: no error on Start Next Task click
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Resolves the root cause of the error enabling normal task start flow

tasks.title: Add automated test for Start Next Task button to prevent 'Content Not Found' errors
tasks.description: Create or extend an end-to-end test in apps/web/tests/e2e/taskExerciseGeneration.test.ts to simulate clicking the Start Next Task button and verify that no 'Content Not Found' errors occur and the next task content loads correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test simulates Start Next Task button click
Test asserts no 'Content Not Found' error is thrown
Test verifies next task content is loaded

outputPlan.description: Add e2e test case for Start Next Task button functionality

metadata.inputContext: Fixed task start flow code from previous task
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Prevents regression of the 'Content Not Found' error in future changes
